creator: martin.dieringer@gmx.de
text:
/usr/local/lib is missing in library path:

cc build/temp.freebsd-9.2-PRERELEASE-amd64-2.7/source/bases/Console.o -L/usr/local/lib/python2.7/config -lpython2.7 -o build/lib.freebsd-9.2-PRERELEASE-amd64-2.7/cx_Freeze/bases/Console -Wl,--export-dynamic -lintl -lutil -lm -s
/usr/bin/ld: cannot find -lintl
error: command 'cc' failed with exit status 1
*** [do-build] Error code 1

Stop in /ports/devel/cx_Freeze.

How-To-Repeat:         try to build port
